aim.name: Aim
aim.description: Setup/Builder: Take a steady breath and aim. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Focus Pip.

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Setup: Identify a weakness in your target. Applies [Marked] and generates 1 Focus Pip.

snipe.name: Snipe
snipe.description: Payoff: A precision shot to a vital point. Consumes 5 Focus Pips to deal devastating Physical damage. Range increased by 3.

piercing_arrow.name: Piercing Arrow
piercing_arrow.description: Payoff: An arrow that punches through armor. Consumes 3 Focus Pips to ignore 50% of target defense.

disengage.name: Disengage
disengage.description: Defense/Mobility: Leap away from a target. Grants [Evasive] and moves you to an adjacent room.

camouflage.name: Camouflage
camouflage.description: Defense: Blend into the environment. Grants [Concealed] for 10 ticks while stationary.

pinning_shot.name: Pinning Shot
pinning_shot.description: Mobility/Disruption: Aim for the legs. Applies [Rooted] for 3 ticks.

recon_flare.name: Recon Flare
recon_flare.description: Utility: Light up the target room. Reveals all [Concealed] entities and grants Full Vision.

ranger_physiology.name: Ranger Physiology
ranger_physiology.description: Passive: Keen Eyes. You gain 15% increased vision range and 10% bonus damage against [Marked] targets.
